dialogue_turns.content: Hi! My name is David. Nice to meet you!
Nice to meet you too, David! How can I help you today?
I work as a UX designer. I've been doing this for a few years now.
That's great! A UX designer — sounds interesting. What kind of things do you work on?
I mostly work with programming. Currently working on project_D.
Got it! Sounds like you have a solid skill set.
Outside of work I enjoy painting, yoga. I also like reading about open source.
Those are some great hobbies! Always good to have a healthy work-life balance.
I prefer a structured approach to work. My go-to tools are Jupyter and pandas.
Noted! I'll keep your structured preference in mind.
